title: NTM Mekked
description: A modpack based around the New Tardis Mod (currently for 1.16.5) and Mekanism.
body: ### **Welcome!** This modpack was designed around the New Tardis Mod and Mekanism. We hope to provide a more complete exploration experience while providing the technology needed to keep up with TARDIS maintenance on a regular basis. Here's hoping our fellow Whovians will enjoy playing our modpack. *Please note this pack is in the early stages of development and new mods are being added regularly, bugs are likely while we test compatibility and tweak configurations. If you have any issues, feel free to contact the team on Discord.* ### **Featuring:** - Tardis Mod - Doctor Who - Regeneration - Doctor Who - Weeping Angels - Mekanism - CC: Tweaked - Atum 2 ### **Misc. Mods** - Handles - Temporal Additions - JEI - Oh The Biomes You'll Go - Quark - Tetra - Traveller's Backpack - Adorn - Advanced Peripherals *Looking to follow Tardis Mod development? Check out the [discord](https://discord.gg/sxRz4ep9Ye)!*
